item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: I disagree with the emphasis on individual rights above all else.

notes: Both agents end opposed to strict society-over-individual priority. Agent A visibly shifts from a rights-first opener toward a structural-inequality and broader-societal-impact critique, but does not fully support the statement. Agent B remains mostly rights-first while acknowledging systemic inequities as part of protecting individual liberty.
